channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 2026 Stack Showdown: Ruby on Rails vs Next.js for Bootstrapped Startups
item.description: Cut cloud costs by 63% and ship twice as fast: compare Rails 8 vs Next.js 15 for bootstrapped startups in 2026. Real benchmarks, concrete numbers, and the mistakes that cost weeks of runway.

item.title: App crashes after Android 15 upgrade: why X fails with Y
item.description: Cut ANR crash rate by 95% after Android 15 upgrade — exact alarm permissions, WorkManager fixes, and Samsung-specific enforcement for apps targeting API 35, with budget tiers and CI checks to prevent regressions

item.title: CDN vs Local Cache: Which cuts latency for your API?
item.description: Cut API latency by 88–97 % with CDN vs local cache — real benchmarks, bandwidth costs, and the cache stampede mistakes that break both under load.

item.title: Pair Programming: When It’s Worth It in 2024
item.description: Reduce bug escape rate by 61% and cut time to resolution by 68% by pairing on small features for 30 minutes. Learn when pair programming is worth it and how to start with Python and Node.js examples.

item.title: Why Rust, Go, and Zig paid 30% more in 2026
item.description: Cut cloud costs by 77% by switching from Python and Node.js to Rust, Zig, and Go in 2026 — benchmarks, memory leaks, and the languages that paid off most

item.title: Remote beats office for dev velocity: here’s the raw data from 3M builds
item.description: Cut build time by 66% with remote runners: 4m 12s local vs 1m 22s remote, plus MTTR drops 12% and energy use falls 93% — real data from 14 months and 1M builds.

item.title: Why your phone now knows who you’ll argue with next
item.description: Cut notification fatigue by 68% with a real-time social graph that respects attention budgets — 3.8 alerts/day, $40/month stack, and the failure modes that break the promise of tech changing human relationships.

item.title: Write human-sounding AI content in 4 steps — tested on 10 blogs
item.description: Reduce post-editing time by 65% with a 4-step AI pipeline tested on 50 posts — median cost $0.0037 per draft, bounce rate down 28%. Use this prompt template and observability stack to keep AI content human-sounding.

item.title: Debugging Mindset finally explained
item.description: Cut production outages by 60% with a debugging mindset that treats bugs as data points, not verdicts. Learn the Layered Hypothesis model, a real-world Python cache bug fix, and the eBPF tool that found a 400ms delay in a Go app.

item.title: Freelance Developer Income: Realistic Numbers: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Freelance Developer Income: Realistic Numbers failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a…

item.title: How we cut repetitive tasks down to 1 hour a week
item.description: Save 10 hours a week using this AI workflow — gpt-3.5 costs under $0.004 per 1k rows, the Translator Pattern, and the exact tools we used to cut manual work from 15 hours to 1 hour.

item.title: Why Docker in Production Fails with OOM Killer (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut unplanned downtime from Docker OOM Killer crashes by 100% — learn why containers exit silently, how to set memory limits, and prevent evictions with real benchmarks, logs, and fixes tested on 4GB VMs in Jakarta and Vietnam.

item.title: Blue-Green vs Canary Deployments: Real Numbers, Real Choices
item.description: Cut production incidents by 70% with the right deployment pattern — blue-green vs canary compared on latency, cost, and rollback time with real numbers and code examples for teams from $200/month droplets to Series B AWS accounts.

item.title: Scaled a 50 million user messaging app with $700/month infra
item.description: Hit 1M messages/sec with 8ms median latency on $680/month using SQLite, Go, and Redis — the exact stack WhatsApp used to justify a $19 billion buyout.

item.title: How we cut production incidents by 70% with real-time APM
item.description: Cut production incidents by 70% with real-time APM — trace volume down 94%, detection time from 45 to 3 minutes, and SLO burn rate alerting that reduced false pages by 84%. Learn how we did it with OpenTelemetry, New Relic, and error-budget alerting, including the tools, code, and failures that shaped the solution.

item.title: Why promotions take forever — and how to force the issue
item.description: Cut promotion wait time from 18 months to 90 days with a promotion packet—reverse-engineered rubrics, concrete artifacts, and real case studies from Brazil, Colombia, and Mexico. Learn the exact artifacts reviewers expect and how to pre-sell them before the cycle opens.

item.title: Memory leaks finally explained
item.description: Cut process memory growth by 70% in 30 minutes with the right profiler — memory leaks finally explained with concrete tools, benchmarks, and the mistakes that waste hours.

item.title: Python vs Go vs Rust: Why One Crashes at 100ms and the Other Runs for 3 Years
item.description: nute with 40% failure. Docs promise "Rust i with Python Rust One Crashes — find their M-Pesa payment callback dies at 1000 req.

item.title: TypeScript Advanced Patterns: Branded Types vs Nominal Typing
item.description: Cut type-related incidents by 80% with TypeScript advanced patterns — branded types vs nominal typing benchmarks, real code examples, and the maintenance surprises that cost days of refactoring.

item.title: 23 CSS tricks seniors actually use (and which ones to ignore)
item.description: Cut CSS maintenance time by 67% with 23 battle-tested tricks seniors actually use — bundle impact, Safari 15 fixes, and production metrics included.
